history.note: Created by local Cybrus automated planning for task F6D69798-494B-48BC-AB89-A19941A826E6.

Current code has Maraithon.Crm, crm_people, crm_person_links, CRM tools, ingestion, fuzzy/semantic lookup, and relationship context. Missing from this spec: separate person_identifiers/person_merges/person_notes, model-callable merge, Telegram card serializer, and /people LiveViews.

Upgraded the stale People/CRM spec into a focused delta against the existing Maraithon.Crm implementation: auditable merge, richer source-evidence links, Telegram card serializer, and model-callable merge tooling.

next_action: Implement the CRM delta: merge/audit schema, source-evidence link fields, merge_people context/tool, Telegram card serializer, tests, and precommit.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Upgraded stale People/CRM spec into an in-progress delta against Maraithon.Crm.
resume_context.notes: Decision: do not create a parallel Maraithon.People context. Build on crm_people/crm_person_links with auditable merge, source evidence fields, Telegram card serializer, and merge tool registration. Defer separate identifier tables, People LiveView, and historical backfill unless implementation reveals a blocker.
pending_steps: Add CRM merge/source-evidence migration and schemas.
Implement merge_people context behavior and serializer.
Add focused tests and run mix precommit.

summary: In progress as a focused CRM delta: auditable merge, source-evidence links, Telegram card serializer, and model-callable merge tooling on top of the existing Maraithon.Crm implementation.
title: Ship People/CRM data model with semantic merge and source links
